channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Cet écran PC gaming HP 24″ QHD 240 Hz tombe à moins de 200 €, son prix le plus bas, l’occasion idéale pour changer de matériel
item.description: Pour les joueurs PC en quête d'un nouvel écran de qualité, Amazon fait une vente flash sur le HP Omen 27qs, un écran gaming très fluide qui passe de 510 euros à 199,99 euros.

item.title: M5 MacBook Air Hands-On: All of the Changes Are Under the Hood
item.description: If it ain't broke, don't fix it.

item.title: Here are the 6 best Google Pixel 10 upgrades coming in the next Pixel Drop update
item.description: Google has announced the features coming in its next Pixel Drop, and you're in for a treat.

item.title: On sait déjà (presque) tout des Samsung Galaxy A57 et A37
item.description: Il ne manquait plus que les fiches techniques des Galaxy A37 et A57 pour tout savoir sur les futurs smartphones haut de gamme de Samsung. C'est désormais chose faite.

item.title: Save your money and don't buy the iPad Air M4 —get the iPad Air M3 for a record-low price at Amazon
item.description: Thanks to the release of the iPad Air M4, Amazon has the powerful 11-inch iPad Air M3 on sale for its lowest price ever, making it a better value.

item.title: Downdetector and Speedtest sold to Accenture for $1.2 billion
item.description: Downdetector and Speedtest - the free platforms that allow people on the web to quickly check internet speeds or see if an online platform may be down - will soon have a new owner. On Tuesday, the consulting and IT services provider Accenture announced that it has agreed to acquire the Ookla-owned platforms from Ziff […]

item.title: 6 things Apple announced at its big March event — the full list, from the iPhone 17e to the MacBook Neo
item.description: We're still trying to take in everything Apple has announced this week — here are all the details on all the products.

item.title: Google Pixel 10a review: Small changes, but still great value
item.description: Over the past few years, Google's A-series Pixel phones have consistently been some of the best midrange phones you can buy. But with the AI boom causing memory shortages and the price of consumer electronics to rise, including smartphones, affordable devices like the Pixel 10a are more important than ever. Thankfully, Google's new phone still represents great value, even if it doesn't come with many upgrades. Design and display As before, the Pixel 10a has a 6.3-inch 120Hz P-OLED display. Igor Bonifacic for EngadgetThe story of the Pixel 10a is one of small changes, so let’s start with the ou...

item.title: Polymarket Decides Incentivizing a Nuclear Detonation Might Be a Bad Idea
item.description: The prediction market platform recenlty pulled trades on the probablibly of a nuclear weapon being denotated.

item.title: The US military is still using Claude — but defense-tech clients are fleeing
item.description: As the US continues its aerial attack on Iran, Anthropic models are being used for many targeting decisions.

item.title: 'The total industrialization of cyber threats': Cloudflare report outlines how hackers are 'weaponizing the Internet'
item.description: There is a "fundamental rewiring of the modern cyberattack" going on and AI is at the center.

item.title: Nucléaire ou solaire : quelle énergie a vraiment porté la France en 2025 ?
item.description: L’Hexagone est en bonne voie dans sa transition électrique. En 2025, plus de 95 % de l’électricité produite en France est d’origine décarbonée, tandis que les énergies fossiles poursuivent leur chute.

item.title: UPerfect’s $120 portable monitor is a big-screen dream: For commuters and multitaskers who need extra screen space, the 18.5-inch 120Hz IPS display is an easy recommendation
item.description: UPerfect’s 18.5-inch portable monitor with a 120Hz 1080p IPS display and FreeSync support is now just $120 at Newegg.

item.title: NordVPN’s Android feature now warns Europeans about scam calls before they answer
item.description: NordVPN’s Call Protection feature now warns Android users across Europe, the US, the UK, Canada, Japan, and Australia about potential scam calls before they pick up

item.title: 'Highly adjustable, remarkably comfortable': Autonomous ErgoChair Pro is the office chair we return to over and over, and it's $100 off
item.description: Autonomous ErgoChair Pro has all the comfort features I look for in a high-end ergonomic chair, including adjustable headrest, armrests and lumbar support.

item.title: Whatever This Is, We’ve Never Seen Anything Like It
item.description: Blacklisting Anthropic feels like a peek at an uncertain future.

item.title: Elon Musk to testify in Twitter shareholder trial accusing him of deflating stock before $44 billion purchase
item.description: The billionaire Tesla CEO reached a deal to buy Twitter and take it private in April 2022. Elon Musk is expected to take the stand in a shareholder trial on Wednesday in San Francisco, where he’s accused of making false and misleading statements that drove down Twitter’s stock price before he bought the social media platform for $44 billion in 2022....

item.title: Des montres connectées bien plus intelligentes et autonomes grâce à la nouvelle puce Snapdragon Wear Elite
item.description: Lors du MWC de Barcelone, Qualcomm a levé le voile sur sa nouvelle puce pour montres connectées, le Snapdragon Wear Elite. De quoi proposer des montres aux performances accrues tout en intégrant des cœurs dédiés à l'IA.

item.title: Honor’s Robot Phone is a bad robot, an interesting camera, and maybe your friend
item.description: After over four months of teasing, I've finally been able to see Honor's Robot Phone in action. And after all that, it looks pretty legit - just so long as you weren't actually expecting a robot. The Robot Phone could more accurately be called the Gimbal Phone, though I suspect the company's marketing department would […]

item.title: Meilleur aspirateur robot 2026 : quel modèle choisir ?
item.description: Vous êtes à la recherche d'un bon aspirateur robot pour vous simplifier la vie? Voici notre sélection des meilleurs robots aspirateurs, tous testés et approuvés.

item.title: Comparatif MacBook Neo, Air M2, M4 et M5 : le guide pour ne pas se tromper
item.description: Vous rêviez d'un MacBook neuf sous la barre des 700 € ? Apple l'a fait avec le MacBook Neo. Équipé d'une puce d'iPhone, cet ultraportable promet l'essentiel.

item.title: ‘A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms’ Season 2 Just Cast Some Major Players
item.description: Lucy Boynton, Babou Ceesay, and Peter Mullan have come aboard the 'Game of Thrones' spin-off as characters book readers know very well.

item.title: Google Pixel 10a Review: One Lazy Refresh
item.description: Google really phoned it in with its latest Pixel A-series phone.

item.title: Google Pixel 10a Review: Sensible Value
item.description: It may not offer much new, but the Pixel 10a remains one of the best smartphones in the US for under $500.

item.title: ‘It’s by design’: the LG G6 OLED TV’s colors aren’t as punchy as the G5's in its best picture mode — and that’s on purpose, says LG
item.description: Seeing a new OLED not look as bold next to its predecessor can be jarring, but with the LG G6, it appears to be intentional.

item.title: I reviewed the ‘world’s first’ Dolby Atmos FlexConnect soundbar ‘system’ and it’s really something — here’s what I made of LG’s multi-box Sound Suite
item.description: I finally tried a soundbar system with Dolby Atmos FlexConnect, and to say it impressed me would be an understatement.

item.title: The MacBook Neo is Apple’s take on the Nike Dunk
item.description: Apple’s $599 laptop is a supply-chain triumph wrapped in nostalgic candy colors, but it fails to deliver the ‘new’ its name demands. Apple’s new 13-inch laptop, the MacBook Neo, is a cheap MacBook in the era of expensive PCs, when AI’s endless appetite for memory has caused the price of computers to skyrocket.

item.title: Mon test du Pixel 10a, ou quand Google fait du neuf avec du vieux
item.description: Nouveau fleuron de milieu de gamme de Google, le Pixel 10a rabote son module photo, mais ne change aucun de ses composants, ou presque. Et pourtant, il a été amélioré.

item.title: Well, there goes any reason to buy an iPad Air
item.description: Apple just announced the MacBook Neo, a 13-inch laptop offering the full macOS experience for just $599. It is the machine, I’m sure, plenty of the company’s fans have been clamoring for since the dawn of the netbook. I’m equally sure its specs have enough drawbacks to ensure there are still plenty of customers for the more expensive Macbooks; the same cannot be said of the iPad Air. If you’re looking for a machine that you can actually use meaningfully, the Neo has the Air beat. It has two USB-C ports, 16-hour battery life, a real keyboard, trackpad and the ability to run macOS with proper m...

item.title: iPhone 17e hands-on: Pretty in pink, with portraits enabled
item.description: The iPhone 17e was announced on Monday through a press release, so there was no real chance to immediately get a hands-on with it. But at Apple’s event in New York today, the phone was on display alongside the new MacBook Neo, iPad Air M4, MacBook Pro M5 and Studio Display XDR. I managed to take it for a quick spin to see if it is truly as similar to the iPhone 16e as it appeared from pictures. Spoiler: It mostly is.One of the most noteworthy changes to the iPhone 17e is the addition of MagSafe support, and aside from confirming whether that works, I don’t really have any impressions to add. I...

item.title: Comment acheter le MacBook Neo à moins de 600 euros ?
item.description: Le MacBook Neo est maintenant proposé à moins de 600 euros, mais seulement pour les étudiants. Un tarif qui risque de participer au succès de la machine à sa sortie.

item.title: Wero lance le paiement en ligne en Belgique, la France va suivre
item.description: Après l'Allemagne, la Belgique devient le deuxième pays européen où l'on peut payer certains achats en ligne avec Wero, le concurrent d'Apple Pay. Et en France ? Ça arrive.

item.title: After a week streaming live sports with a VPN, here are the 3 things I found that'll drive you crazy
item.description: It's really not as simple as you'd think

item.title: MacBook Neo : les 6 sacrifices faits par Apple pour baisser son prix
item.description: Apple propose enfin un véritable ordinateur portable d'entrée de gamme avec le MacBook Neo, une machine qui ne dépasse pas les 800 euros, mais qui présente de nombreuses concessions techniques.

item.title: MacBook Neo : les vrais sacrifices d’Apple pour casser les prix
item.description: Proposer un véritable Mac au prix d'un smartphone milieu de gamme est un tour de force historique. Mais pour atteindre ce tarif plancher inédit, la firme de Cupertino a dû amputer son nouvel ordinateur portable de nombreuses technologies essentielles.

item.title: Best laptops of MWC 2026: the five most exciting mobile computing products we've spotted at the show
item.description: We've been stalking the show floor at MWC 2026 to find the most exciting upcoming laptops — and these are the ones I've picked.

item.title: TikTok won’t use end-to-end encryption, citing harm to users
item.description: The platform’s line of argument follows that of many governments and child protection charities, but it sets TikTok apart from some of its competitors. While social media platforms have a habit of copying each other, there’s one area where TikTok is forging its own path.

item.title: How Iran built such a formidable cyberwar machine
item.description: Even as bombs fall across the Middle East, Iranian-linked hackers are launching digital attacks across the region. Decades of investment made that possible. Bombs are falling across the Middle East as the United States and Israel try to bring Iran to heel. But while physical infrastructure is toppling in Iran, the country’s digital armies are still fighting with force....

item.title: X taps William Shatner to give out invites to its payments service, X Money
item.description: 42 X users donated to William Shatner's charity in exchange for an early invite to X Money beta.

item.title: Une console rétro avec écran AMOLED pour 175 € ? C’est la Retroid Pocket 5 avec son design ergonomique qui dépoussière le passé
item.description: Pour revivre les sensations gaming d'antan, il faut soit posséder les consoles de l'époque, hors de prix, soit passer par l'émulation avec des machines comme cette Retroid Pocket 5 vendue 175,28 euros au lieu de 199 euros sur AliExpress.

item.title: World’s Biggest Acidic Geyser Springs Back to Life After Years of Dormancy
item.description: The geyser is likely to fall back into dormancy soon, but there's a slim chance the spectacular eruptions will continue into summer.

item.title: The Texas Senate Primary Was a Preview of Creator Wars to Come
item.description: After the 2024 election, influencers were seen as an asset. A contentious race between Democrats James Talarico and Jasmine Crockett showed that they can also be a liability.

item.title: 100 Go en 5G, sans engagement : ce n’est pas pour rien que ce forfait mobile est la valeur sûre du moment [Sponso]
item.description: Ce n’est pas pour rien que Bouygues Telecom est l’un des opérateurs les plus plébiscités des Français. Non seulement la qualité de son réseau est excellente, mais ses forfaits mobiles affichent en plus un rapport qualité-prix toujours intéressant. C’est encore le cas avec ce nouveau forfait 100 Go à 9,99 euros par mois.

item.title: Il va bientôt falloir mettre Google Chrome à jour plus souvent
item.description: Google change le cycle de déploiement des mises à jour de son navigateur Chrome. Elles vont être plus rapprochées.

item.title: L’Arcom ordonne le blocage de 35 nouveaux médias russes en France
item.description: Parmi les mesures en place pour sanctionner la Russie depuis le début du conflit en Ukraine, se trouve le blocage des médias russes en Europe et en France. Mais ces derniers restent tout de même accessibles via d'autres noms de domaine ; un jeu du chat et de la souris qui oblige l'Arcom à taper du poing sur la table.

item.title: MacBook Neo versus an old MacBook Air: good luck
item.description: My first thought when Apple announced the MacBook Neo today was "okay, but why not just get an older Air?" If you're thinking that too, you might be right. If you can find one. The Neo starts at $599 with an A18 Pro processor, 8GB of memory, and 256GB storage, and ends at $699 with […]

item.title: De la rouille pour faire tourner Internet ? L’incroyable pari énergétique de Google avec ses batterie fer-air
item.description: Les géants de la tech continuent d’investir pour alimenter leurs immenses centres de données qui font tourner le monde numérique. Engagé dans cette course énergétique, Google s’apprête à construire une centrale de stockage d’un genre inédit par sa capacité.

item.title: MacBook Neo hands-on: Apple's $599 laptop feels shockingly great
item.description: The most interesting product Apple announced this week was its cheapest and least powerful laptop, the MacBook Neo. It’s just fascinating to see the company tackle an entirely new category — it’s not a premium ultraportable like the MacBook Air, and it’s not a computing powerhouse like the MacBook Pro. It’s simply an affordable $599 laptop. And after spending some time with it at Apple’s spring launch event today, I’m convinced it’s going to be a huge hit for the company. For a $599 system, the MacBook Neo doesn’t look or feel like a budget machine. Its colorful aluminum case looks even more a...

item.title: No more single-player Sony PS5 exclusives are coming to PC according to a new report
item.description: Sony is reportedly stepping away from offering PC ports of its games.

item.title: Google faces wrongful death lawsuit after Gemini allegedly ‘coached’ man to die by suicide
item.description: A lawsuit filed on Wednesday accuses Google's Gemini AI chatbot of trapping 36-year-old Jonathan Gavalas in a "collapsing reality" that involved a series of violent missions, ultimately ending with his death by suicide. In the days leading up to his death, Gemini allegedly convinced Gavalas that he was "executing a covert plan to liberate his […]

item.title: Pre-order the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra from Amazon and get a free storage upgrade and a free $200 gift card
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra pre-order at Amazon comes with a free $200 Amazon gift card and a free storage upgrade

item.title: Another Oracle data center issue was apparently to blame for latest TikTok outage
item.description: After TikTok sees issues in the US for the second time in a little more than a month, another Oracle outage was apparently to blame.

item.title: Les jeux PlayStation sur PC, c’est terminé : Sony restera exclusivement sur console
item.description: Mettant fin à presque 6 ans de multiplateformes, Sony ne proposera plus ses gros jeux sur ordinateur à l'avenir. Ils seront uniquement disponibles sur PlayStation 5.

item.title: We’ve Drastically Underestimated Sea Levels, Putting Millions at Risk, Study Warns
item.description: An analysis of coastal impact assessments revealed that the majority are not based on direct sea-level and land-elevation measurements—that's troubling.

item.title: A 17-Year-Old ‘Torchwood’ Shrine Is Being Torn Down For Good
item.description: The famous memorial to Gareth David-Lloyd's fallen 'Torchwood' character Ianto Jones in Cardiff Bay will be no more as of next month.

item.title: How Federal Agencies Got Caught Up in Trump's Anti-Immigration Crusade
item.description: WIRED spoke with workers across seven government agencies—from the IRS to HUD—about how their work has been contorted to support ICE and other immigration efforts.

item.title: Host a Side Event during TechCrunch Founder Summit Week in Boston
item.description: Want to tap into the energy of 1,100+ startup founders, investors, and tech leaders descending on Boston for the Founder Summit 2026 on June 9? Host your own Side Event during “Founder Summit Week,” happening June 4-10!

item.title: How to watch Lazio vs. Atalanta in the Coppa Italia online for free
item.description: How to watch Coppa Italia for free. Live stream Lazio vs. Atalanta in the 2026 Coppa Italia for free.

item.title: Keep track of your keys, luggage, and pets with this $64 Apple AirTag 4-pack
item.description: As of March 4, the Apple AirTag (1st Generation) 4-pack is down to $64.00 at Amazon. That's a 35% discount, or $35 in savings.

item.title: Ninja just super-sized its iconic glass air fryer — and it can do a lot more than just cook chips
item.description: The Ninja Crispi Pro left our US reviewer seriously impressed, and it's ready to take its place in your kitchen.

item.title: How to preorder the 2026 Apple Studio Display, including the mini-LED Studio Display XDR
item.description: Apple's two new Studio Display monitors will cost $1,599 and $3,299. Preorders are live now along with new MacBooks and iPads.

item.title: Level up your living room with the 55-inch Samsung S90F 4K Smart TV for its lowest price ever
item.description: As of March 4, get the 55-inch Samsung S90F OLED 4K Smart TV for its lowest price ever.

item.title: Google’s Pixel 10 is the best Android phone available, and it’s $200 off
item.description: Google’s Pixel 10a is set to arrive on March 5th, but if you’d prefer the more powerful Google Pixel 10, Woot is currently selling it unlocked through March 6th for $599 ($200 off) with 128GB of storage. While we’ve seen it drop to $449 during Black Friday, this is one of the best prices we’ve […]
